|desc={{p|Salazzle}} is Plumeria's first known Pokémon. She was first used to attack [[Gladion]] after he had arrived at [[Po Town]] for the first time. Later, at [[Vast Poni Canyon]], she was used to launch a sneak attack on Faba's {{p|Hypno}}, defeating it and releasing its grasp on Plumeria.

Salazzle's known moves are {{m|Venom Drench}}, {{m|Dragon Tail}}, and {{m|Flamethrower}}{{tt|*|mentioned only}}.}}

|desc={{p|Golbat}} is Plumeria's second known Pokémon. It was first used to follow [[Faba]] after he escaped from the battle at [[Vast Poni Canyon]].

None of Golbat's moves are known.}}
